prompt: Build a local catalog for my physical music collection with album metadata, track lists, search, and CSV import/export.
Create a local file index that scans a chosen folder or volume, stores metadata, supports search, and lets me tag records.
Build a personal trading-card catalog where I can add cards, search them, filter by player or year, and export the collection.
Create a searchable music repertoire catalog for works by title, catalog number, key, and instrumentation.
Build a local catalog for software demos where I can browse titles, developers, categories, and compare entries.
Create a physical media library catalog for records, CDs, DVDs, tapes, and discs with searchable metadata.
Build a personal book catalog with metadata, search, categories, and exportable reading lists.
Create a minimalist quote library where I can save quotations with author and source, organize them by topic, and search them later.
Build a personal archive of books I have read with review notes, ratings, and searchable entries.
Create a local medical-record organizer where I can store dated documents, notes, and searchable health history.
Build an archive for recorded audio media where I can catalog titles, formats, track lists, and storage locations.
Create a concert archive where I can catalog shows by date, venue, setlist, and notes.
Build a searchable quotation archive focused on environmental writing with author, source, topic, and notes.
Create a personal CD organizer with album details, search, condition notes, and simple print or export options.
Build a local VHS and tape catalog with title, content notes, storage location, and search.
Create a local address and records keeper with contacts, notes, printable labels, and simple search.
Build a movie reference archive where I can browse films by year, genre, and title with personal notes.
Create a sports-card collection catalog with player, team, year, condition, and exportable reports.
Build a personal music library archive with artist, album, track data, notes, and filtering by format or genre.
Create a removable-media catalog where I can record what is stored on disks, drives, or archived volumes without mounting them all.
Build a local card archive for a tarot deck with searchable entries, imagery, meanings, and reading notes.
Create a collectibles catalog for a personal doll collection with item details, condition, storage location, and notes.
